## Highlights

**Full Rust rewrite.** The C++ helper and PAM module from v0.1.0 are gone;
both crates are now in a Cargo workspace under `crates/`.

**Layer-shell overlay UI.** The confirmation dialog now renders as a
`zwlr-layer-shell-v1` overlay surface: full-screen translucent backdrop,
exclusive keyboard focus, dialog card centered on top. No more session-lock
plan — layer-shell is the default and only path. `--windowed` falls back
to a regular xdg-toplevel for compositors without `zwlr-layer-shell-v1`.

**Transactional install/uninstall.** `install.sh` records every file it
touches (with pre-install backups for any pre-existing files) into
`/var/lib/sentinel/install.state`. On any error mid-install, an `ERR` trap
rolls back to the exact pre-install state. `uninstall.sh` reads the same
state file to restore originals — including any custom `polkit-1` or
`sudo` PAM configs the user had before installing.

## Install

### Arch / AUR

```bash
yay -S sentinel        # release
yay -S sentinel-git    # main branch
```

### Source

```bash
tar xf sentinel-0.2.0.tar.gz
cd sentinel-0.2.0
pkexec ./install.sh
```

### Prebuilt binaries

The `sentinel-0.2.0-x86_64-linux.tar.gz` archive contains a tree mirroring
`/`. Stage it under any prefix; `install.sh` and `uninstall.sh` are
included.

## Compatibility

- Wayland compositor with `zwlr-layer-shell-v1` (cosmic-comp, Hyprland, Sway).
- libpam, sudo or sudo-rs.
- Tested on Arch Linux + cosmic-comp.

## SHA-256 checksums

See `sentinel-0.2.0.sha256` in the release assets.
